microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise users including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, authoring product requirements and self-service scheduling features that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned a manual process into a scalable, user-first execution model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable validation model for continuous product improvement.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating across engineering, operations, and partner teams to ensure launch success.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation by building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows, **cutting planning cycle time 39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Collaborated across Engineering, Design, and Marketing functions to define feature requirements, communicate product status to senior stakeholders, and align **go-to-market readiness** for platform capabilities serving millions of enterprise workloads.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly by embedding the tool into core developer flows.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by conducting **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating user needs into clearly scoped requirements for the engineering team.

Improved data integrity and **user experience** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling faster, more accurate information retrieval across teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating buy-in across 140+ teams to unblock a stalled product initiative.

Defined a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting **discovery interviews with 20+ service teams** to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a prioritized roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.

Enabled leadership to **target automation gaps** and allocate resources more effectively by engineering a Power BI dashboard that tracked operational toil across 140+ teams, turning raw data into actionable product and investment decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and writing clear requirements to align Engineering, IT, and Operations on implementation.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain steady delivery velocity across a cross-functional product team.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and removing recurring implementation roadblocks that had slowed feature delivery.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM process that improved user experience for both customers and the internal sales team.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to improve product positioning and reach target user segments more effectively.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting a **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks and delivering data-driven recommendations that directly informed product and service strategy.
